Spring Data Redis

Interface RedisPubSubCommands

All Known Subinterfaces:
DefaultedRedisClusterConnection, DefaultedRedisConnection, RedisClusterConnection, RedisCommands, RedisConnection, RedisConnectionUtils.RedisConnectionProxy, StringRedisConnection
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractRedisConnection, DefaultStringRedisConnection, JedisClusterConnection, JedisConnection, LettuceClusterConnection, LettuceConnection
@NullUnmarked public interface RedisPubSubCommands
PubSub-specific Redis commands.
Author:
Costin Leau, Mark Paluch, Christoph Strobl

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable Subscription
    getSubscription()
    Returns the current subscription for this connection or null if the connection is not subscribed.
    boolean
    isSubscribed()
    Indicates whether the current connection is subscribed (to at least one channel) or not.
    void
    pSubscribe(@NonNull MessageListener listener, byte @NonNull [] @NonNull ... patterns)
    Subscribes the connection to all channels matching the given patterns.
    Long
    publish(byte @NonNull [] channel, byte @NonNull [] message)
    Publishes the given message to the given channel.
    void
    subscribe(@NonNull MessageListener listener, byte @NonNull [] @NonNull ... channels)
    Subscribes the connection to the given channels.

  • Method Details

    • isSubscribed

      boolean isSubscribed()
      Indicates whether the current connection is subscribed (to at least one channel) or not.
      Returns:
      true if the connection is subscribed, false otherwise

    • getSubscription

      @Nullable Subscription getSubscription()
      Returns the current subscription for this connection or null if the connection is not subscribed.
      Returns:
      the current subscription, null if none is available.

    • publish

      Long publish(byte @NonNull [] channel, byte @NonNull [] message)
      Publishes the given message to the given channel.
      Parameters:
      channel - the channel to publish to. Must not be null.
      message - message to publish. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the number of clients that received the message or null when used in pipeline / transaction.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: PUBLISH

    • subscribe

      void subscribe(@NonNull MessageListener listener, byte @NonNull [] @NonNull ... channels)
      Subscribes the connection to the given channels. Once subscribed, a connection enters listening mode and can only subscribe to other channels or unsubscribe. No other commands are accepted until the connection is unsubscribed.

      Note that this operation is blocking and the current thread starts waiting for new messages immediately.

      Parameters:
      listener - message listener, must not be null.
      channels - channel names, must not be null.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: SUBSCRIBE

    • pSubscribe

      void pSubscribe(@NonNull MessageListener listener, byte @NonNull [] @NonNull ... patterns)
      Subscribes the connection to all channels matching the given patterns. Once subscribed, a connection enters listening mode and can only subscribe to other channels or unsubscribe. No other commands are accepted until the connection is unsubscribed.

      Note that this operation is blocking and the current thread starts waiting for new messages immediately.

      Parameters:
      listener - message listener, must not be null.
      patterns - channel name patterns, must not be null.
      See Also:
      • Redis Documentation: PSUBSCRIBE
